name: parkly
//: TEAMMATES — first time pulling this change:
2. Run ONE install from the root (not inside backend/ or parkify/):
After that, you never need to cd into backend/ or parkify/ to install.
All dependencies now live in the root node_modules/.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix parkify" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:clean: rm -rf backend/node_modules parkify/node_modules node_modules && npm install
